backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing role-based access control, blob storage, and comprehensive healthcare management including stakeholder registration requests (professionals, vendors, NGOs, ambulances), profiles, medical records, research projects, health records, and medical tourism functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features related to generating and integrating a high-definition hero image for the About Us page, listing relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing, pages (dashboard, contact, legal pages, onboarding, careers, vendors), components (chatbot, navigation, request cards), hooks, and styling with Royal Teal/White color scheme.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS variables for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with basic meta tags, favicon reference, and root div for mounting the app titled 'AI Health Zon'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application router setup using TanStack Router with all route definitions including home, about, solutions, onboarding, careers, vendors, ambulance, NGOs, network directory/map, members, knowledge board, clean claim intelligence, admin dashboard, contact, and legal pages, wrapped with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers.
frontend/src/components/Chatbot.tsx: AI chatbot component with expandable floating interface providing contextual responses about healthcare services, RCM, technology solutions, network directory, careers, vendors, ambulance services, and NGOs with contact information (info@aihealthzon.com, +91-8696766966).
React form component using react-hook-form for submitting demo booking requests with fields for name, hospital, designation, mobile, email, city, and message. Handles form validation, submission via mutation hook, and displays success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying AI Health Zon branding, contact email, social media links (Facebook, X, LinkedIn, Instagram), navigation links organized in columns (Quick Links, Services), and copyright information.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps the application with Navigation header, main content area (Outlet), Footer, and WhatsAppButton in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/components/MemberDetailView: Dialog modal component that displays detailed member profiles for healthcare professionals, vendors, or NGOs with contact information, professional details, specialties/services, and action buttons for WhatsApp and email communication.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile menu toggle, navigation links to all major pages, and Internet Identity authentication button that handles login/logout with query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/PendingRequestsL: List component that displays pending requests (professional, vendor, ambulance, or NGO) using RequestDetailCard components, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup form component for new users to select account type (hospital, professional, vendor, NGO) and enter their name, submitting via mutation hook to create initial user profile.
frontend/src/components/RequestDetailCar: Displays detailed information for registration requests (healthcare professionals, vendors, NGOs, ambulances) with expand/collapse functionality and approve/reject actions. Includes contact information display and WhatsApp/email integration.
frontend/src/components/StakeholderDetai: Modal dialog component that shows comprehensive details for stakeholders (hospitals, vendors, NGOs) including contact info, verification status, and action buttons for WhatsApp, email, and website links.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button component that opens WhatsApp chat with a hardcoded phone number (918696766966) in a new window.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, automatically recreating it when identity changes and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality, managing identity state and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized React Query hooks for all backend API calls including user profiles, admin checks, registration submissions, pending request queries, and approval/rejection mutations for all entity types.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, enterprise color scheme (royal teal/white), form styling, and responsive design utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: About Us page with hero section, mission/vision cards, company values, team section, and CTA buttons. Includes a demo booking modal and uses HD background images.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard for reviewing and managing stakeholder registration requests (healthcare professionals, vendors, NGOs, ambulances). Includes access control, summary cards, and tabbed pending requests lists.
frontend/src/pages/AmbulanceServices.tsx: Ambulance service registration page with form for contact details, PIN code-based location auto-fill, service type checkboxes, and submission to backend. Includes benefits cards and success stories section.
frontend/src/pages/Careers.tsx: Healthcare professional registration page with job application form, CV upload with progress tracking, PIN code-based location auto-fill, and role selection dropdown. Includes benefits cards and testimonials section.
frontend/src/pages/CaseStudies.tsx: Case studies landing page with hero section and empty state message indicating content coming soon. Includes multiple CTAs for demo booking throughout the page.
frontend/src/pages/CleanClaimIntelligenc: Product page showcasing Clean Claim Intelligence with 9 validation layers presented in accordion format, each detailing specific features. Includes demo booking modal and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page component with hero section, contact information cards (phone, email, location), multiple CTAs for scheduling calls/demos, and a chatbot. Includes a modal dialog for demo booking form.
frontend/src/pages/HealthcareSupportSyst: Healthcare support system page displaying various support categories (workforce, emergency, diagnostics, pharmacy, home healthcare, mental health, vendors, NGOs) with icons, images, descriptions, and navigation to specific category pages.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage component featuring an auto-rotating hero carousel, why-choose-us section with benefits, solutions cards (RCM, technology, connecting platform), metrics display, and demo booking modal. Includes navigation with hash-based scrolling.
frontend/src/pages/KnowledgeBoard.tsx: Knowledge board page providing comprehensive information about hospital licensing and regulatory compliance in India, with hero section, accordion-based content, external research publication link, and demo consultation booking.
frontend/src/pages/Members.tsx: Members directory page displaying approved healthcare professionals, vendors, and NGOs in a grid layout with filtering, member type badges, and detailed member view modal. Fetches data using useGetAllApprovedMembers hook.
frontend/src/pages/NetworkDirectory.tsx: Displays a searchable and filterable directory of healthcare stakeholders (hospitals, vendors, NGOs) with cards showing details and a modal for viewing full stakeholder information. Includes hero section, filter controls, and integrates with backend queries to fetch and display all entity types.
frontend/src/pages/NetworkMap.tsx: Shows a visual representation of the healthcare network with statistics (total stakeholders, cities covered) and a grid of location cards grouped by city. Features a hero section with map background and uses approved stakeholder location data.
frontend/src/pages/NgoListing.tsx: Provides NGO registration form with PIN code-based auto-fill for location fields and displays a filterable list of approved NGOs. Handles form submission, validation, and integrates with backend mutations and queries.
frontend/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx: Presents a multi-phase onboarding guide for the revenue cycle management process with 10 phases (patient registration through reporting). Features phase navigation, images, and key points for each phase.
frontend/src/pages/PatientJourney.tsx: Placeholder page for the Patient Journey Document Library feature showing a 'Coming Soon' message. Describes future functionality for managing patient documentation across the healthcare journey.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Static informational page displaying the privacy policy with sections on data collection, usage, sharing, security, and user rights. Formatted as a card with prose styling.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Displays a static refund policy page with sections on eligibility, request process, processing time, non-refundable items, and cancellations using Card components.
frontend/src/pages/Solutions.tsx: Presents RCM (Revenue Cycle Management) solutions with features, problem statements, impact metrics, FAQs, and a demo booking modal. Includes accordion UI and integration with DemoBookingForm component.
frontend/src/pages/TermsConditions.tsx: Renders a static terms and conditions page covering acceptance of terms, service usage, user responsibilities, intellectual property, liability limitations, and modifications.
frontend/src/pages/Vendors.tsx: Vendor registration page with form for submitting vendor details including auto-fill location fields via PIN code lookup, category selection, and display of all registered vendors using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/utils/pinCodeLookup.ts: Utility function that fetches Indian postal location data (district, state, post office) from the India Post API based on a 6-digit PIN code with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including enterprise color palette, container settings, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file for 'AI Health Zon' tracking features for generating and integrating a 1920x1080 hero image for the About Us page. Contains one pending feature request (AR-1) and two existing features related to image generation and integration.
